Notes: Put mat/cushion visible the night before. Set this plan as an easy bookmark. Choose 7:30 AM as the default start.
After bathroom/teeth, before messages: start the recovery video. Minimum version: 2 minutes on the mat.
Start the fixed strength/mobility video. Keep ribs down, spine long, and move from hips.
Start the light mobility video. Keep legs fresh for Saturday soccer.
Yoga days: 30 minutes after yoga. Non-yoga days: 15 minutes morning and evening. Minimum version: 3 mindful breaths.
Every Sunday after practice, mark Y/M/MIN for the week. Never miss twice. After 4 weeks, change only one thing if needed.
